overview.vision: Fully digitalize UMKM restaurant operations — from order taking to kitchen management, payment processing, inventory tracking, and business analytics — replacing manual notebook-based processes with an offline-first POS system.
goals: Eliminate manual recording errors and untracked inventory loss
Provide real-time visibility into business performance (revenue, top items, shift accountability)
Streamline order-to-payment-to-kitchen workflow with digital automation
Enable financial accountability through shift management with cash reconciliation
Support multiple payment methods (Cash, QRIS, E-Wallet, Transfer) with proper tracking

in_scope: F-001: Order creation with additional item support
F-002: Kitchen Display System with real-time chef-waiter notifications
F-003: Multi-method payment processing (Tunai/QRIS/E-Wallet/Transfer) with PPN, discount, success popup, receipt print
F-004: Inventory management with auto-deduction and low stock alerts
F-006: Recipe management with viewer and editor
F-007: Owner dashboard with KPI cards, revenue charts, peak hours, top items, shift performance
F-008: User management with role-based access (owner, waiter-cashier, chef)
F-009: Authentication with PIN security for shift and POS access
F-015: Cash register shift management with PIN, one-way closing, mandatory reconciliation
F-016: POS system settings (PPN/tax, restaurant info, receipt config)
F-017: Void/cancel transactions with PIN verification and audit trail
F-010: Table management with visual map
F-011: Transaction history with Shift/PIC, comprehensive filters, export to Excel
F-018: Discount/promo management with order-level application
out_of_scope: F-W01: Online customer ordering (out of scope for MVP)
